module.name: HTML
module.param:
Version 0.6.1 (June 9th, 2026)
  • Another round of changes to improve our determination of which records comprise a single call. The previous changes in 0.6 had some problems, including one bug where all calls in a single coSpace were treated as a single massive call.
  • Added the new key required by Splunk, "python.required" to restmap.conf. No code change was required - the app was already compatible with Python 3.9.
  • Fixed some Python 3.13 compatibility issues.
Version 0.6 (April 20th, 2026)
  • Fixed a critical problem where our notion of "call id" and how the cisco_cdr app tied this together, was failing to merge sets of events from different servers into the overall call.
Version 0.5.4 (March 16th, 2026)
  • Added a new panel to the CMS Call Detail page, enumerating every value of every field in all of the call legs.
  • First version of a more realistic landing page dashboard. Showing call concurrency, top callingParty names, counts of calls vs encrypted calls, distinct deviceTypes and party numbers seen.
Version 0.5.3 (March 2nd, 2026)
  • Improved the Call Detail page to also pull in events that don't have the call_id field but only have the callLegId field of one of the call's legs.
  • Gave the Call Detail page a simple Gantt-chart style visualization of when each participant joined and left during the call.
  • Fixed a bug on the Call Detail page where the table of call legs wasn't displaying them in time order.
Version 0.5.2 (February 9th, 2026)
  • Fixed manager links in the nav.
  • timestamps are now properly extracted.
  • Improved the logic that groups together the disparate events that comprise a single call.
  • Improvements to various field aliases and calculated fields.
  • Added a view of the raw XML events to the call detail page, to make it easier to iteratively add/edit field extractions.
Version 0.5.1 (January 26th, 2026)
  • Fixed some field extractions. Added new field aliases and definitions.
Version 0.5 (January 19th, 2026)
  • First release
